justification: All 6 rubric criteria for pass are met: (1) All 5 valid transitions from AC1 implemented via VALID_TRANSITIONS lookup table, (2) Custom InvalidTransitionError with code: 'INVALID_TRANSITION' property, (3) Both DELIVERED and CANCELLED terminal states enforced with empty Sets, (4) Tests cover all 5 valid transitions plus 10+ invalid transitions including exhaustive terminal-state checks, (5) AC6 SHIPPED->PENDING explicitly tested, (6) No external libraries, (7) acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 6 ACs.

observations.text: Custom Error subclass with Object.setPrototypeOf for correct prototype chain — goes beyond minimum requirements
Exhaustive terminal-state testing against all 5 possible targets, not just a couple examples
53 assertions total — well beyond the minimum test coverage required
CONFIRMED->CANCELLED transition explicitly included, avoiding the common whitelist omission failure mode
Self-transitions correctly treated as invalid with documented reasoning
